response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r2c1's SoC (10%) is critically below your share threshold (20%) and matches your survival-mode belief; accepting 0.5 kWh inbound aligns with aggressive solicitation policy to extend depletion horizon in island mode.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.2, distrusted_peers=['r4c1'].
Your latest belief: Critical SoC (11%) in island mode; 1.6h depletion horizon. All neighbors rejecting outbound. Shift to aggressive inbound solicitation from geographic circle, excluding r4c1. Accept any inbound >= 0.1 kWh to extend survival window..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
